hr-assistant.text: what kind of resume should i look out for

Based on the attached company documents, I would recommend looking for resumes that highlight the following qualifications:

* At least 3 years of experience as a Software Engineer
* Proficiency in Python and React
* Experience with Docker and AWS

Additionally, it would be beneficial to see resumes that mention bonus qualifications such as:

* Experience with Vector Databases (ChromaDB)
* Familiarity with LLMs (Llama 3)

When reviewing resumes, please make sure to verify that the candidate's experience and skills align with the requirements listed in the ACME CORP - HR GUIDELINES 2026 document.

communication-assistant.text: could you create a template for drafting an email to a customer

I'd be happy to help you with that! Here's a basic template for drafting an email to a customer:

**Subject Line:** [Insert Subject Line Here]

**Dear [Customer's Name],**

**[Introduction/Reason for Email]**: [Insert brief introduction or reason for email here, e.g. "I hope this email finds you well. I am reaching out to follow up on the status of your recent order."]

**[Body of Email]**: [Insert main message or information here, e.g. "As you may know, our company is currently experiencing [briefly mention any relevant situation, such as a supply chain issue or a technical glitch]. I wanted to let you know that we are working to resolve this issue as quickly as possible."]

**[Call to Action]**: [Insert specific action you'd like the customer to take, e.g. "If you have any further questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out to us. We're here to help."]

**[Closing]**: [Insert closing statement, e.g. "Thank you for your patience and understanding. We appreciate your business and look forward to serving you in the future."]

**[Signature]**: [Insert your name and title, e.g. "Sincerely, [Your Name], Customer Service Representative"]

This is just a basic template, and you can customize it to fit your company's tone and style. Remember to keep your email concise, clear, and professional!

Let me know if you'd like me to add anything else to the template.
